name: berth-compiler
description: Automatically interview, create or reconstruct, validate, fidelity-test, and publish Berth Agents with exactly one user decision per turn.

interface.longDescription: Choose the local or competition Berth platform, validate a developer token, then let Codex run a strict one-question-per-turn interview, create or reconstruct Agent packages, validate fidelity, and upload privately or publicly.
defaultPrompt: 帮我创建并上传一个 Berth Agent。每轮只问我一个问题，其余流程你自动完成。
把当前项目里的 Agent 高还原度转换并上传到 Berth。每轮只让我做一个选择。
检查并修好当前 Berth Agent，直到达到可发布状态。
